audit_scope.method: Direct visual transcription from complete Chevrolet model-year color tables. Original Chevrolet sales brochures and specification sheets carried by archival hosts remain manufacturer documents. Secondary code guides are cited only where they corroborate a printed model-specific table. Specialty paint remains a separate evidence class. No color is projected into an adjacent year.
audit_scope.code_policy: Canonical codes are published only when printed in a controlling Chevrolet table or corroborated by a model-specific compatibility guide. Secondary code crosswalks remain research metadata and never fill a canonical code that the controlling table did not print.

years.color_code_note: The verified color list prints names but no paint or RPO codes. Codes remain null rather than being inferred from secondary sources.
availability_notes: The kit limits Z71 to Onyx Black, Summit White, Forest Green Metallic, and Light Pewter Metallic.
years.two_tone_status: No two-tone combination list appears on the verified Color and Trim page. This is not a claim that no two-tone treatment was offered elsewhere.

source.title: 2003 Chevrolet Tahoe Vehicle Information Kit
source.section: Interior and Exterior Color Compatibility; SEO Solid Color Paint; SEO Special Paint One Color

exterior_colors.name: Light Pewter Metallic
exterior_colors.restriction: Listed for the regular Tahoe range and for Z71 in the contemporaneous sales brochure.

exterior_colors.name: Indigo Blue Metallic
exterior_colors.restriction: Listed for the regular Tahoe range; not listed for Z71 in the contemporaneous sales brochure.

exterior_colors.name: Black
exterior_colors.restriction: Listed for the regular Tahoe range and for Z71 in the contemporaneous sales brochure.

exterior_colors.name: Dark Green Metallic
exterior_colors.restriction: Listed for the regular Tahoe range and for Z71 in the contemporaneous sales brochure.

exterior_colors.name: Summit White
exterior_colors.restriction: Listed for the regular Tahoe range and for Z71 in the contemporaneous sales brochure.

exterior_colors.name: Sandalwood Metallic
exterior_colors.restriction: Tan or Neutral interiors only; not listed for Z71 in the contemporaneous sales brochure.

exterior_colors.name: Dark Gray Metallic
exterior_colors.restriction: Gray or Dark Charcoal interiors only; not listed for Z71 in the contemporaneous sales brochure.

exterior_colors.name: Redfire Metallic
exterior_colors.restriction: The contemporaneous sales brochure excludes Redfire Metallic from its four-color Z71 list. The later official kit chart prints a superscript 3 on Redfire, which conflicts with that brochure and appears inconsistent with the chart's own four-color Z71 footnote.

source_conflicts.resolution: Use the contemporaneous September 2002 sales brochure for retail Z71 applicability.
source_conflicts.detail: The later kit chart on PDF page 138 visibly marks Redfire Metallic with superscript 3 even though footnote 3 states that it identifies the only Z71 colors. That would produce five colors. The contemporaneous brochure expressly lists only Black, Light Pewter Metallic, Dark Green Metallic, and Summit White.

years.specialty_publication_note: Only Woodland Green, Doeskin Tan, Tangier Orange, and Wheatland Yellow are expressly orderable through TGK on PDF page 140. The other five SEO chart rows remain research-only and are not published as Tahoe availability.

years.color_code_note: The verified complete color sentence prints names but no paint or RPO codes. Codes remain null rather than being inferred.
